description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, rectangular layout. The structure features a combination of white and beige exterior walls, large windows, and multiple entry points, including a main entrance and a garage. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes landscaped green lawns at both the front and rear, as well as paved walkways and a driveway. The backyard is expansive, offering ample open space, while the front yard is neatly organized with geometric grass patches and small shrubs. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor areas, typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roof, large windows, and landscaped front and rear lawns, enclosed by a low boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, paved driveway, and landscaped front yard with geometric grass patches and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, large rear lawn, and the boundary wall enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive backyard, secondary entrance, and the garage structure adjacent to the lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the front yard, driveway, and the overall rectangular layout of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
